name: Olive Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add the sour cream and blend until combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and blend well.
4. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
5. Makes about 2 1/4 cups of dip.
6. Suggested dippers: Scallions, Jalapeno Peppers, Celery Root, Potato Chips, Duck Sausage
